title: crotalaria micans
intro: Crotalaria micans is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, known for its yellow flowers and unique characteristics. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Crotalaria micans include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and other respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, and it can also be powdered and used as a supplement or added to traditional remedies.
